presentation.title: Faculty Deck 02 — Connecting Industry to Your Ambition

slides.title: Ambition Meets Industry
slides.body:
Your ambition statement is not abstract — it lives in a real market.

Today you will:
• Interview or observe a practitioner
• Capture industry insights for your squad
• Draft your opportunity reflection
slides.speakerNotes: Show example connection: ambition → industry niche. 4 min.
discussionQuestions: Read your ambition — what industry segment fits?

slides.title: Interview & Observation Protocol
slides.body:
Prepare 5 questions before you speak to a practitioner.
Listen for: client problems, career path, daily habits, industry changes.
Capture quotes — your business plan will use this evidence.
discussionQuestions: What is one question you are afraid to ask?

slides.title: Squad Research Plan
slides.body:
Squads will research a market segment this week.
Document: target segment, key questions, interview schedule, roles.
Lead presents research plan at debrief.
discussionQuestions: What segment will your squad investigate?

slides.title: Day 2 Deliverables
slides.body:
✓ Interview notes
✓ Industry insights (squad)
✓ Research plan
✓ Opportunity reflection → Portfolio
discussionQuestions: What is one action before Day 3 market observation?
